David IV of Georgia.summary: Ruled the Kingdom of Georgia from 1089 to 1125 and led the decisive victory at the Battle of Didgori in 1121.
David IV of Georgia.significance: His reign broke Seljuk dominance over Georgia and inaugurated the Georgian Golden Age.

relation_descriptions.David IV of Georgia|participated_in|Batt: Commanded the Georgian forces at the Battle of Didgori on August 12, 1121.
